field.name: pdb_refout
field.description: Power down Reference output buffer (active low)

field.name: all_ch_dis_mclk
field.description: Keep DCLK even when all channel are disabled

field.name: spi_sync
field.description: SYNC pulse generated through SPI\nWhen low, this signal is AND’ed with the value on the START pin in the control module and generates a pulse in the SYNC_IN pin.\nWhen high, this bit is AND’ed with the value on START pin in the control module

field.name: sar_diag_en
field.description: Sets SPI interface to read back SAR result on SDO

field.name: clk_qual_dis
field.description: Disable clock qualifier check if user reqyire to use an MCLK < 256 kHz

field.name: spi_subordinate
field.description: Enable SPI subordinate to read-back ADC on SDO

field.name: write
field.description: Value sent to the GPIO pins

field.name: read
field.description: Data read from the GPIO pins

field.name: err_output_sat0
field.description: Channel 0 — ADC conversion has exceeded limits and has been clamped

field.name: err_filter_sat0
field.description: Channel 0 — Filter result has exceeded a reasonable level, before offset and gain calibration has been applied

field.name: err_output_sat1
field.description: Channel 1 — ADC conversion has exceeded limits and has been clamped

field.name: err_filter_sat1
field.description: Channel 1 — Filter result has exceeded a reasonable level, before offset and gain calibration has been applied

field.name: err_output_sat2
field.description: Channel 2 — ADC conversion has exceeded limits and has been clamped

field.name: err_filter_sat2
field.description: Channel 2 — Filter result has exceeded a reasonable level, before offset and gain calibration has been applied

field.name: err_output_sat3
field.description: Channel 3 — ADC conversion has exceeded limits and has been clamped

field.name: err_filter_sat3
field.description: Channel 3 — Filter result has exceeded a reasonable level, before offset and gain calibration has been applied

field.name: err_output_sat4
field.description: Channel 4 — ADC conversion has exceeded limits and has been clamped

field.name: err_filter_sat4
field.description: Channel 4 — Filter result has exceeded a reasonable level, before offset and gain calibration has been applied

field.name: err_output_sat5
field.description: Channel 5 — ADC conversion has exceeded limits and has been clamped

field.name: err_filter_sat5
field.description: Channel 5 — Filter result has exceeded a reasonable level, before offset and gain calibration has been applied

field.name: err_output_sat6
field.description: Channel 6 — ADC conversion has exceeded limits and has been clamped

field.name: err_filter_sat6
field.description: Channel 6 — Filter result has exceeded a reasonable level, before offset and gain calibration has been applied

field.name: err_output_sat7
field.description: Channel 7 — ADC conversion has exceeded limits and has been clamped

field.name: err_filter_sat7
field.description: Channel 7 — Filter result has exceeded a reasonable level, before offset and gain calibration has been applied

field.name: mod_sat_test_en
field.description: Enable Error Flag for Modulator Saturation

field.name: rom_crc_err
field.description: A CRC of the fuse contents is run periodically to check for errors in the fuses

field.name: memmap_crc_err
field.description: A CRC of the memory map contents is run periodically to check for errors

field.name: rom_crc_err_en
field.description: Enable a CRC of the fuse contents is run periodically to check for errors in the fuses

field.name: memmap_crc_err_en
field.description: Enable a CRC of the memory map contents is run periodically to check for errors

field.name: ldo_psm_trip_test
field.description:
Run PSM Trip
00 — no trip detect test enabled
01 — run trip detect test on AREG1CAP
10 — run trip detect test on AREG2CAP
11 — run trip detect test on DREGCAP

field.name: chip_error1
field.description: High when any error bit is high

field.name: chip_error2
field.description: High when any error bit is high

field.name: chip_error3
field.description: High when any error bit is high

field.name: load_update
field.description: Assert to load SRC registers into SRC

field.name: load_source
field.description: Select which option to load an SRC update
